notable_excerpts: 12% global electricity by 2030 is almost four times the current level.
AI has created a circular economy in energy, utilities and resources sector.
Leveraging the best-in-class training infrastructure that we have, both from a physical perspective as well as from a digital perspective.
We have embarked on a talent transformation journey to build an ambidextrous workforce.
Trust and governance are critical with respect to the new AI Act.
There are hallucinations, there are model breaches, and there are also governance issues.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted Infosys's focus on energy transition and circular economy, significant investment in employee training and AI transformation, and the importance of trust and governance in AI deployment. Environmental disclosures were specific to energy growth and circularity, social aspects emphasized training and workforce transformation, while governance focused on trust and risk management.
strengths: Strong focus on energy transition and circular economy
Comprehensive employee training and transformation initiatives
weaknesses: Limited specific details on governance practices
red_flags: Potential governance issues with AI deployment
